briefs.title: BC Casinos Must Track Source of Funds for Player Buy-Ins Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: A new BC regulation takes effect April 13, 2026, requiring gaming facilities to follow rules about where players' money comes from when they buy in to games — covering cash, gaming accounts, and online play.
briefs.action_required: Review the Source of Funds Regulation and update your compliance procedures before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Source of Funds Regulation for gaming facilities takes effect
